mission: Organize DreamCo as a professional AI operating system where humans and bots safely finish tasks, build products, sell domains, and run client-ready workflows from the Actions page.
repository_standards: Keep generated reports, generated catalogs, source code, configs, dashboards, docs, and tests clearly separated.
Do not move large bot families until a migration map and import-impact check exists.
Every public claim must point to generated evidence or a test.
Every live external action must have an approval gate.
Every domain, app-store, browser, OS, payment, and social action must be reversible or have a rollback note.

human_bot_os_browser.mission: Make Buddy OS and the Buddy browser a safe shared workspace where humans approve goals and bots prepare, test, execute approved steps, and explain evidence.
browser_standards: separate public research, authenticated sessions, client data, and sandbox tests
record source URL, timestamp, confidence, and next safe action
block private account actions until the owner approves
summarize pages instead of storing useless raw data
prefer official/public pages and user-approved sources
os_standards: one task inbox for humans and bots
every bot action has owner, status, evidence, and approval state
every connected app has permissions, risk, rollback, and support notes
every device or browser action is sandbox-first when possible
every client workspace can be exported as a clean demo packet
